assignments.companyDefaultDescription: The default policy applied to all employees. Manage defaults in the Policies tab.
assignments.deleteEmployeeDescription: This will remove the override for "{name}". They will use their team or company default.
assignments.deleteTeamDescription: This will remove the policy from team "{team}". They will use the company default.
assignments.employeeLevelDescription: Override team or company defaults for specific employees (e.g., special contracts)
assignments.employeeNote: This policy will override team and company defaults for this employee
assignments.employeePolicyDescription: Select a vacation policy and employee. This overrides team and company defaults.
assignments.inheritanceInfo: Policies are applied in priority order: Employee overrides take precedence over Team overrides, which take precedence over the Company Default. Create overrides only when needed.
assignments.noEmployeePolicies: No employee-specific policies. Employees use their team or company default.
assignments.noPolicies: No vacation policies available. Create one first.
assignments.noTeamPolicies: No team-specific policies. All teams use the company default.
assignments.teamLevelDescription: Override the company default for specific teams (e.g., different locations or schedules)
assignments.teamNote: This policy will apply to all employees in this team
assignments.teamPolicyDescription: Select a vacation policy and team. This overrides the company default for team members.

vacation.description: Manage vacation policies and assignments for your organization

employees.description: Configure custom vacation allowances for individual employees

detail.addManualAdjustmentDescription: Create a new adjustment entry for special circumstances (e.g., bonus days, corrections). Each adjustment is recorded in the audit log.
detail.adjustmentDaysDescription: Use positive numbers to add days, negative to subtract
detail.adjustmentReasonDescription: Required when making adjustments (for audit trail)
detail.adjustmentReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this adjustment is being made...
detail.daysCarriedOverDescription: Days carried over from previous year
detail.fallsBackToDefaultPolicy: Falls back to team or organization default policy
detail.overrideOrganizationDefault: Override the organization default ({{days}} days) for this employee

employees.emptyDescription: Add employees to your organization to manage their vacation allowances.
employees.title: Employee Allowances

vacation.fallsBackToTeamOrDefault: Falls back to team or company default
vacation.noDefaultPolicyDescription: Create a policy and mark it as Company Default in the Policies tab.
vacation.policyDescription: Configure vacation allowance settings. Each policy can be assigned to the organization, specific teams, or individual employees.

policyForm.accrualStartMonthDescription: Month when vacation accrual begins (typically January or hire date)
policyForm.accrualTypeDescription: How vacation days are granted throughout the year
policyForm.allowCarryoverDescription: Allow employees to carry unused days to next year
policyForm.carryoverExpiryMonthsDescription: Number of months before carried-over days expire (optional)
policyForm.companyDefaultDescription: This policy will apply to all employees without specific overrides. Setting this will supersede any existing company default.
policyForm.defaultAnnualDaysDescription: Default number of vacation days per year for all employees
policyForm.maxCarryoverDaysDescription: Maximum days that can be carried over (leave empty for unlimited)
policyForm.policyNameDescription: A descriptive name to identify this vacation policy

vacation.title: Vacation Management

policies.delete-default-warning: Warning: "{name}" is the company default policy. You must set another policy as default before deleting this one.
policies.delete-description-v2: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This will also remove all assignments for this policy.
policies.no-policies-created: No vacation policies created yet. Create a policy to define vacation allowances for your team.
